title: Blocked action omitted from trace
targetInvariant: Runtime readiness requires traces of allowed and blocked state-affecting attempts.
attackPattern: A platform logs successful operations but hides or discards denied pack activation, sharing, or promotion attempts.
attemptedShortcut: Claiming traceability from success logs only.

mustAllowIfAny: human review path where OFARM basis exists

farmerValueProtected: Ensures farmers and auditors can see what the system refused, not just what it did.
readinessClaimImpact: Failure blocks any AI-agent/runtime/world-model readiness claim for the affected capability.
